---
title: "scRNA Simulation Analysis"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
```

```{r paths, include=FALSE}
# ── User-specific paths ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "choiyej") {
  # root_path <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  root_path <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Laura Pyle - Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path  <- "/Users/choiyej/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofColoradoDenver/Bjornstad Pyle Lab/keys.json")
} else if (user == "yejichoi") {
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/"
  git_path  <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/yejichoi/keys.json")
} else if (user == "pylell") {
  root_path <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path  <- "/Users/pylell/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path.")
}
```

```{r s3-setup, include=FALSE}
# ── S3 credentials ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Sys.setenv(
  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID     = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION    = "",
  AWS_REGION            = "",
  AWS_S3_ENDPOINT       = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```

```{r}
benchmark <- s3readRDS(object = "Projects/Paired scRNA simulation analysis/results/benchmark/benchmark_avg.rds", bucket = "scrna", region = "")

benchmark <- benchmark %>%
  dplyr::mutate(method_family = case_when(method %in% c("mast", "wilcox") ~ "pseudoreplication",
                                          method %in% c("edger", "limma") ~ "pseudobulk",
                                          method == "nebula" ~ "mixed model"),
                method = factor(method, labels = c("mast" = "MAST",
                                                   "wilcox" = "Wilcoxon rank-sum",
                                                   "edger" = "edgeR",
                                                   "limma" = "limma-voom",
                                                   "nebula" = "NEBULA"),
                                levels = c("mast", "wilcox",
                                           "edger", "limma",
                                           "nebula")))
```

```{r}
method_palette <- c("edgeR"  = "#98c1d9",
                    "limma-voom"  = "#3d5a80",
                    "MAST"   = "#f4978e",
                    "NEBULA" = "#52796f",
                    "Wilcoxon rank-sum" = "#edafb8")

plot_metric_by <- function(data, x_var, x_levels = NULL,
                           x_label = x_var, y_var = "mean_power",
                           y_label = "Average Power", hline = 0.8) {
  
  # Coerce x to ordered factor if levels supplied
  if (!is.null(x_levels)) {
    data[[x_var]] <- factor(data[[x_var]], levels = x_levels)
  } else {
    data[[x_var]] <- factor(data[[x_var]])
  }
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]], fill = method)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    facet_wrap(~ method, ncol = 2) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
          legend.position = "none",
          strip.background = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = method_palette)
  
  if (!is.null(hline)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = hline, linetype = "dashed")
  }
  
  p
}

param_specs <- list(
  list(x_var = "n_subjects_per_arm", x_levels = c(5, 10, 20),
       x_label = "N Subjects/Arm"),
  list(x_var = "lfc_label",          x_levels = c("vlow", "low", "med", "high"),
       x_label = "Log2 FC"),
  list(x_var = "indiv_var_label",    x_levels = c("no", "med", "high"),
       x_label = "Between subject SD"),
  list(x_var = "cells_label",        x_levels = c("low", "high"),
       x_label = "Cells per Subject"),
  list(x_var = "corr_cells",         x_levels = NULL,
       x_label = "Cell-Cell Correlation"),
  list(x_var = "prop_de",            x_levels = NULL,
       x_label = "Proportion DE")
)
```

# Power comparisons

```{r}
power_plots <- lapply(param_specs, function(spec) {
  plot_metric_by(benchmark,
                 x_var    = spec$x_var,
                 x_levels = spec$x_levels,
                 x_label  = spec$x_label)
})
names(power_plots) <- sapply(param_specs, `[[`, "x_var")

power_plots

# benchmark %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = factor(lfc_label, levels = c("vlow", "low", "med", "high")), 
#              y = mean_power, fill = method)) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
#   geom_boxplot() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = method_palette) +
#   theme_minimal()

for (nm in names(power_plots)) {
  ggsave(file.path(paste0(root_path, "/scRNA simulation analysis/Results/Figures/power_by_", nm, ".png")), 
         power_plots[[nm]],
         width = 7, height = 5)
}
```
# T1E comparisons

```{r}
t1e_plots <- lapply(param_specs, function(spec) {
  plot_metric_by(benchmark,
                 x_var    = spec$x_var,
                 x_levels = spec$x_levels,
                 x_label  = spec$x_label,
                 y_var = "mean_t1e",
                 y_label = "Average Type 1 Error",
                 hline = 0.05)
})
names(t1e_plots) <- sapply(param_specs, `[[`, "x_var")

t1e_plots
for (nm in names(t1e_plots)) {
  ggsave(file.path(paste0(root_path, "/scRNA simulation analysis/Results/Figures/t1e_by_", nm, ".png")), 
         t1e_plots[[nm]],
         width = 7, height = 5)
  }
```

# FDR comparisons

```{r}
fdr_plots <- lapply(param_specs, function(spec) {
  plot_metric_by(benchmark,
                 x_var    = spec$x_var,
                 x_levels = spec$x_levels,
                 x_label  = spec$x_label,
                 y_var = "mean_fdr",
                 y_label = "Average False Discovery Rate",
                 hline = 0.05)
})
names(fdr_plots) <- sapply(param_specs, `[[`, "x_var")

fdr_plots

for (nm in names(fdr_plots)) {
  ggsave(file.path(paste0(root_path, "/scRNA simulation analysis/Results/Figures/fdr_by_", nm, ".png")), 
         fdr_plots[[nm]],
         width = 7, height = 5)
  }
```

# Compute time comparisons

```{r}
compute_s_plots <- lapply(param_specs, function(spec) {
  plot_metric_by(benchmark,
                 x_var    = spec$x_var,
                 x_levels = spec$x_levels,
                 x_label  = spec$x_label,
                 y_var = "mean_compute_s",
                 y_label = "Computing time (s)",
                 hline = NULL)
})
names(compute_s_plots) <- sapply(param_specs, `[[`, "x_var")

compute_s_plots
```

```{r}
methods <- unique(benchmark$method)

# ---- Option 1: facet by metric (recommended) ----
plot_power_t1e_facet <- function(data, m, x_var = "n_subjects_per_arm") {
  data %>%
    filter(method == m) %>%
    select(all_of(x_var), mean_power, mean_t1e) %>%
    pivot_longer(c(mean_power, mean_t1e),
                 names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
    mutate(metric = recode(metric,
                           mean_power = "Power",
                           mean_t1e   = "Type I Error"),
           xf = factor(.data[[x_var]])) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = xf, y = value, fill = metric)) +
      geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_hline(data = data.frame(metric = c("Power","Type I Error"),
                                   yint   = c(0.80, 0.05)),
                 aes(yintercept = yint), linetype = "dashed") +
      facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y") +
      labs(x = x_var, y = NULL, title = m) +
      theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none")
}

plots_facet <- map(methods, ~ plot_power_t1e_facet(benchmark, .x))
# print: walk(plots_facet, print)
walk(plots_facet, print)
# ---- Option 2: overlay on same panel ----
plot_power_t1e_overlay <- function(data, m, x_var = "n_subjects_per_arm") {
  data %>%
    filter(method == m) %>%
    select(all_of(x_var), mean_power, mean_t1e) %>%
    pivot_longer(c(mean_power, mean_t1e),
                 names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
    mutate(metric = recode(metric,
                           mean_power = "Power",
                           mean_t1e   = "Type I Error"),
           xf = factor(.data[[x_var]])) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = xf, y = value, fill = metric)) +
      geom_violin(position = position_dodge(0.8), alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted",  color = "red") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0.80, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
      labs(x = x_var, y = "Proportion", title = m, fill = NULL) +
      theme_bw()
}

plots_overlay <- map(methods, ~ plot_power_t1e_overlay(benchmark, .x))
plots_overlay
# ---- Option 3: ROC-style scatter (all methods together) ----
plot_power_vs_t1e <- function(data) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_t1e, y = mean_power, color = method)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.80, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(x = "Type I Error", y = "Power",
         color = "Method") +
    # scale_color_manual(values = method_palette) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
          panel.grid = element_blank())
}

plot_power_vs_t1e(benchmark %>% filter(prop_de > 0))
```

# KS statistics at null

```{r}
benchmark %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_ks_stat)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean_ks_stat, fill = method)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = method_palette) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "KS statistic")
```


# logFC bias

```{r}
benchmark %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_logfc_bias)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean_logfc_bias, fill = method)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = method_palette) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "LogFC Bias")

benchmark %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_logfc_mae)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean_logfc_mae, fill = method)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = method_palette) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "LogFC MAE")
```
